creator: _jkrow
caption:
If PTO friendly trips like this are your vibe then you’ll love my Weekend Getaway Guide! It includes a handful of my favorite short itineraries for places that are easily accessible from the East Coast USA

Say ‘WEEKEND’ and I’ll send it over 🫶 

Follow for more adventures from the East Coast ✈️

transcription.text: Don't wake me up, I'm not dreaming Past lives, couldn't ever hold me down Lost love, sweeter when it's finally found I've got the strangest feeling This isn't our first time around Past lives, I couldn't ever promise you
